calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Russell Rowen for Petitioner/Trustee, Charles Holden.

The Court inquired if the petition for instructions can go off calendar. Mr. Rowen stated yes that petition can go off calendar and presented a proposed order approving settlement agreement with the agreement attached.

The Petition for Instructions is OFF CALENDAR. The Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement is Granted (subject to review of written order).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Continued To Mar-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Continued To Jan-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Continued To Dec-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Rowen appeared by telephone for Charles Holden (Petitioner/Trustee).

Mr. Rowen stated that one issue has been resolved, that the other issue has to do with an ownership interest in a real property located in San Luis Obispo, that they had reached a settlement, but the Attorney for three of the Beneficiaries no longer represents them, that the three Beneficiaries have new Counsel and requested a continuance to finalize the settlement agreement. The Petition for Instructions is continued to December 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
